name: @septopus/ipfs
description: Septopus dev IPFS gateway — a file-backed CAS over HTTP, CID-identical to the engine's in-process CAS (imports engine Cid.ts). Seeds the shared content tree (client/core levels/blocks/worlds/stylepacks + public assets) at boot; the client's IpfsRouter falls through to it on a local miss. The realistic network tier of the local-first stack: swap the base URL for a real IPFS gateway and nothing else changes.
